title: Trump to replace Homeland Security chief Kristi Noem with Markwayne Mullin
description: Noem, a former governor, became a prominent figure in the Trump administration's controversial crackdown on immigration.

title: Sri Lanka evacuates crew of second Iranian vessel after US sunk IRIS Dena
description: More than 200 crew members evacuated, a day after a US submarine sank an Iranian frigate, leaving 87 sailors dead.

title: Ukraine, Russia free 200 POWs each in latest swap amid stalled peace talks
description: Exchange comes amid a deadlock in US-brokered negotiations to end the four-year war between the two countries.

title: Trump administration doubles down on military action in Latin America
description: At inaugural 'Americas Counter Cartel Conference', Trump officials vowed continued military operations against cartels.

title: Senators propose ban on US gov’t officials doing prediction market trading
description: The bill comes as a user on Polymarket made more than $500,000 by taking a position that the US would strike Iran.

title: Israel, US intensify Iran strikes, targeting homes, hospitals, stadium
description: Strikes target hospitals, schools, and cultural sites across Iran, disrupting daily life particularly in Tehran.

title: Israel kills more than 100 Lebanese as it commands Beirut residents to flee
description: More than 38,000 Syrians flee Lebanon for Syria, as mounting violence causes displacement across the Middle East and beyond.

title: India beat England to reach T20 World Cup final as Sanju stars again
description: Sanju Samson hit 89 for India as they posted 253-6 and beat England by 7 runs in second semifinal of 2026 T20 World Cup.

title: Israel’s Smotrich threatens Beirut suburbs amid evacuation orders
description: Israel issues forced evacuation order for entire Dahiyeh area of Lebanon's capital, home to hundreds of thousands.

description: Trump declared ‘major combat operations’ on social media. Will this reshape the region for decades?

description: Havana's streets have changed as a US fuel blockade restricts the movements of vehicles and people and hits businesses.

title: Traffic chaos in Beirut as Israel issues forced evacuation order
description: Beirut’s roads are blocked with heavy traffic after Israel issued a forced evacuation order for hundreds of thousands.

description: Complete results might not be known for a week, but trends expected to begin emerging on Friday.

description: Amid ongoing war with Iran, Trump says he aims to be 'involved in the appointment' of the country's next supreme leader.

description: As conflict engulfs Iran, its diaspora feels anguish, reflecting on memories of home and uncertainty about the future.

description: EU and Gulf Cooperation Council leaders condemn 'unjustifiable Iranian attacks' across region after talks in Brussels.

description: New videos show destruction across Iran after US and Israeli air strikes.

description: Men 'lured' into fighting in the Ukraine war say Africans were subjected to worse treatment on the front lines.

description: Players chose to sing the anthem before their game against Australia, in contrast to their silence during the previous tie.

description: US President Donald Trump has spoken to at least three Kurdish groups in Iran and Iraq in recent days.

description: Iran is roughly the same size as Alaska, 2.5 times the size of Texas and covers about one-sixth of the US land area.

description: Kurds weigh Washington's push for a rebellion on Iranian soil against a history of betrayals and pragmatic alliances.

title: Trump, Putin pose as peacemaker in each other’s war as Ukraine gains ground
description: Ukraine has won back some territory this year for the first time since 2023 amid claims of soaring Russian losses.

description: New video shows rescue of Iran sailors after US attack on ship

title: Epstein files with claims against Trump released by US Justice Department
description: Files summarise a woman's accusations against Trump over alleged sexual encounter when she was aged between 13 and 15.

title: Is BRICS bloc divided over US-Israel attacks on Iran?
description: Since India took over as chair, the normally outspoken BRICS grouping appears to be more cautious.

title: Will the Houthis join Iran’s war?
description: As the regional conflict escalates, Abdel-Malik al-Houthi faces a strategic choice: intervene or stay out.

title: Cost to US for war on Iran is $3.7bn in first 100 hours, says think tank
description: Most of the costs are not budgeted for, meaning the Pentagon will need to request more funding soon, researchers say.

title: Tens of thousands in scramble for flights out of Middle East amid Iran war
description: Wealthy travellers are paying up to $200,000 to charter flights out of the region.

title: Why did Trump fire Kristi Noem as DHS secretary; who is Markwayne Mullin?
description: Trump said Mullin will lead the Department of Homeland Security while Noem assigned as special envoy.

title: Anger in Cyprus over UK bases as US-Israel war with Iran endangers island
description: Protests grow as attack on British military site stirs fears that Cyprus is being dragged into a regional conflict.

description: Thousands displaced in Beirut after Israeli forced evacuation order

title: More than 120 killed in Israel’s Lebanon attacks as Beirut, south, east hit
description: Lebanon's Hezbollah group urges Israelis to evacuate border areas as Israel continues to bomb the country.

title: Sudanese army retakes Bara, secures el-Obeid in North Kordofan
description: Source tells Al Jazeera army destroyed 32 RSF combat vehicles, killed dozens of RSF fighters in clashes, drone attacks.
